zh.Chiny, Flemish Brabant, Kingdom of Franc: 法國德 艾斯特姆斯布拉班特
zh.Liege, Lotharingia, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇利艾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thierry DE MELLIER I於大約1145年出生在比利時盧布格尼時，他的父親Albert Ier de Chiny48歲，母親Agnès de Bar28歲。他與Elisabeth DE DONCHERY結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1221年享年77歲。

zh-hans.Chiny, Flemish Brabant, Kingdom of Franc: 法国德 艾斯特姆斯布拉班特
zh-hans.Liege, Lotharingia, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇利艾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thierry DE MELLIER I于大约1145年出生在比利时盧布格尼时，他的父亲Albert Ier de Chiny48岁，母亲Agnès de Bar28岁。他与Elisabeth DE DONCHERY结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1221年享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: MELLIER
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Ulrich.  French Marc, Philippe.
French: occupational name from sellier ‘saddler’. This surname is also found in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Thierry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Germanic Theodoric, composed of elements meaning ‘people’ and ‘rule’. Compare Terry .

en.lifeSummary: When Thierry DE MELLIER I was born about 1145, in Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgium, his father, Albert Ier de Chiny, was 48 and his mother, Agnès de Bar, was 28. He married Elisabeth DE DONCHERY. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1221, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thierry DE MELLIER I est né environ 1145, à Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Albert Ier de Chiny, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Bar, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth DE DONCHERY. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1221, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thierry DE MELLIER I um 1145 in Chiny, Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albert Ier de Chiny 48 und seine Mutter Agnès de Bar 28. Er hat Elisabeth DE DONCHERY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1221 im Alter von 77 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry DE MELLIER I è nato il circa 1145 nel Chiny, Lussemburgo, Belgio, il suo padre, Albert Ier de Chiny, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Bar, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth DE DONCHERY. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1221, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.Chiny, Luxembourg, Belgium: ベルギールクセンボウルグチニー
ja.Chiny, Flemish Brabant, Kingdom of Franc: フランスグランド エストメウゼブラバント

ja.lifeSummary: Thierry DE MELLIER Iが約1145年にベルギールクセンボウルグチニーで生まれた時，父Albert Ier de Chinyは48歳，母Agnès de Barは28歳であった。Elisabeth DE DONCHERYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1221年に77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thierry DE MELLIER I(이)가 대략 1145년 벨기에 루세보우르그 친이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert Ier de Chiny(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Bar(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Elisabeth DE DONCHERY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1221년 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry DE MELLIER I nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Chiny, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Albert Ier de Chiny, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Bar, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth DE DONCHERY. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1221, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thierry DE MELLIER I родился около 1145 г. в местности чини, луксембург, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Albert Ier de Chiny было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Bar, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth DE DONCHERY. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1221 г. в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thierry DE MELLIER I nació aproximadamente 1145, en Chiny, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Albert Ier de Chiny, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Agnès de Bar, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elisabeth DE DONCHERY. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1221, a la edad de 77 años.
